subject: B727 paint scheme rev # 2
body:
this guy has some imagination on flag ideas,
 
 
There are more design ideas for the B727 online at
_http://www.schemedesigners.com/B727-JEGE_ 
(http://www.schemedesigners.com/B727-JEGE) 

I  tried two different style flags.  Let me know which direction, if  any
Jeffrey likes.  See if you can get a little more of a detailed  answer than
normal so that I can be as responsive to his desires as  possible.

Best regards,



Craig Barnett,  CEO
